lines.english: You gave us our soul, breath of life and body.
We are all beggars, O God; You are merciful to us.
I am a fool, but You have made me beautiful, enshrining Your Light within me.
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
O my Beloved, only You have the potency to act,
Chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, we are uplifted and exalted. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਪਾਵਉ ਤੁਮ ਤੇ ਸਗਲ ਥੋਕ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau paavau tum te sagal thok |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and cause all to be done. ||1||Pause||
Chanting the Naam, the mortal is saved.
Chanting the Naam, honor and glory are received.
Chanting the Naam, sublime peace and poise are found.
For this reason, you have been blessed with this body, so difficult to obtain.
O my Dear God, please bless me to speak the Naam.
Chanting the Naam, no obstacles shall block your way. ||2||
This tranquil peace is found in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਰਿਦੈ ਜਪੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੋ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa ridai japee prabh tero naam |3|
lines.english: May I always chant and meditate within my heart on Your Name, O God. ||3||
Other than You, there is no one at all.
As it pleases Your Will, save me, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰੋ ਖੇਲੁ ਤੁਝ ਮਹਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh tero khel tujh meh samaeh |
lines.english: Everything is Your play; it all merges again into You.
O Nanak, peace is obtained by meeting with the Perfect Guru. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai simaran dukh na hoe |
lines.english: Remembering Him in meditation, there is no pain or suffering.
Gazing upon Him, I live, O my mother.
My Beloved God, my King is with me.
Basant, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰੋ ਧਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo praan sabh tero dhan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This soul, breath of life, and wealth are all Yours, O Lord. ||1||Pause||
My Beloved is the Support of my breath of life and mind.
Please, take pity on me, and lead me on to meet Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਸੇਖ ਨ ਲਹਹਿ ਭੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: mun jan sekh na laheh bhev |
lines.english: The silent sages, the humble, and the religious teachers do not understand His mystery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee gat mit kahee na jaae |
lines.english: His state and extent cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਖੋਜਹਿ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਦੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau khojeh sur nar dev |
lines.english: He is sought by the angels, mortals and divine beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt ghatt ghatt rahiaa samaae |2|
lines.english: In each and every home of each and every heart, He is permeating and pervading. ||2||
His devotees are totally in bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੇ ਭਗਤ ਕਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa ke bhagat kau naahee khai |
lines.english: His devotees cannot be destroyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੇ ਭਗਤ ਕਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਭੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa ke bhagat kau naahee bhai |
lines.english: His devotees are not afraid.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੇ ਭਗਤ ਕਉ ਸਦਾ ਜੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jaa ke bhagat kau sadaa jai |3|
lines.english: His devotees are victorious forever. ||3||
What Praises of Yours can I utter?
God, the Giver of peace, is all-pervading, permeating everywhere.
Be merciful, and bless me with Your Name. ||4||5||
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak begs for this one gift.
Just as the servant is encouraged by his ruler,
just so, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, egotism is eradicated.
As the plant turns green upon receiving water,
we are saved by the Guru. ||1||
Each and every instant, I humbly bow to You. ||1||Pause||
You are the Great Giver, O Generous Lord God.
Whoever enters the Saadh Sangat
He is liberated from bondage.
His devotees worship Him in adoration; they are united in His Union. ||2||
that humble being is imbued with the Love of the Supreme Lord God.
My thirst is quenched, by Guru's Grace.
My eyes are content, gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.
My mind is satisfied, with the sublime taste of the Lord's subtle essence. ||3||
My tongue sings the Infinite Praises of God.
O Primal Infinite Divine Being.
Your servant is committed to the service of Your Feet,
Your Name is the Saving Grace of all.
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak has received this teasure. ||4||6||
You are the Great Giver; You continue to give.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਨਉ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: hau kachhoo na jaanau teree saar |
lines.english: I do not understand anything of Your Worth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਨਿਰਗੁਨ ਇਕੁ ਗੁਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mohi niragun ik gun na jaan |1|
lines.english: I am unworthy; I know none of Your Virtues at all. ||1||
You have given me all sorts of foods and dishes.
You permeate and pervade my soul, and my breath of life.
